Stalagterror Spine Spear  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 34
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Disempower (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 8.0 Size: LARGE
Class: SHD
Race: HUM ERU DEF TRL OGR GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Item info
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2002 at 4:18 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252757168
Scholar
19 posts
The spear

1. Is useable by gnome sks.
2. Procs at lvl 1.

I paided 800pp for this and its worth it. My lvl 2 gnome sk twink with no gear hits for as much as 20 with this thing and it proc'd the first time he pierced with it. Not a bad midrange weapon at all. Will due til I get my mace of the shadowed soul. Hope I helped

Eristotle Andronicus
45 Druid Halfelf
Druids Empire - Rallos Zek
▲ Page top
RE: Item info
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2004 at 7:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591791021110
152 posts
just wait till you hit level 20, this thing should hit starting in the 30s. my monks using a 12/23 and its hitting up to 31 at 28. this would be pretty nice when hitting for full.

btw should use lower dly weapon for twinking, anything with dmg > 10 is basically useless until level 20. low dly lowish dmg, say a 10/20 or such, would benefit much more than a 15/34, because of the level 20 damage cap (20).
▲ Page top
RE: Item info
QuoteReply
# May 30 2003 at 1:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1652660341379
758 posts
I was just about to wonder about that... I have both the Stalag and the Mace of The Shadowed Soul ( https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=2664 ) and was wondering about which is truly better. The DD of the Mace os MUCH better, but with no proccing effect.

Will that help determine which to use???

I am a hoarder, so getting one of these from me will be tough, lol ... I just need to know what one I truly need to use and keep on my SK: http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=701493
▲ Page top
RE: Item info
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2003 at 11:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758514208
47 posts
Like he said use both I use spear til it procs then change to MoSS for the big damage.

QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2001 at 2:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770219971
2 posts
It is one handed, so you can still use your shield.
▲ Page top
Excellent SK twink item
QuoteReply
# Dec 06 2001 at 2:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245869660
13 posts
I play as the most intellegent Troll on the Brell Serilis Server, His name is Burps Doombreath. He started as a twink because I had a full suit of sentient armor just taking up space. This spear is an awesome twink weapon for Sks that solo because the proc is a str,sta,ac reducer and it stacks with your sk steal str spell, so you can really bring you targets Str down fast. Great for soloing, cast your spell, get the spear to proc and watch the mob go from hitting for 30s to hitting for 5s


▲ Page top
Price
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2001 at 10:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763808077
Scholar
17 posts
Bought one on CT server for 300 PP. They drop like water and most Sks don't want them since there are better items out there for piercing. (I am not sure what, I just wanted someting for my sk to work up piercing and it was cheap.)
By the way I was told that paying 300 pp for it ment that i got robbed. So, I would say that 1702 is a bit much.

Personally i like it, it is fun to mess with.

▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2001 at 11:26 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Anyone know what this sells for on Morrell Thule? I'd like to sell mine and have yet to see it up for sale
▲ Page top
RE: PC on Morrel Thule
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2001 at 12:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756601829
7 posts
I'm a solo troll SK on Drinal--lvl 23. Just bought this from NPC vendor in The Overthere for ~750 PP. Nearly busted me, but the prices for buying in-game are higher.

Anyway: proc'd right away, really cool. Seems random, but maybe 1-3 times a fight. Some mobs resist, some don't.

My char has no skills at piercing, so building from ground up. (Doing the same w/ 2HB) Even so, killing blues OK. Char's Double Attack is at 98, which helps.

This may become my new main weapon for my 20's. And yes, the look is totally suck. Boring spear.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 18 2001 at 3:28 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Graphic on this weapon look sux. WHY?
Yes, this does proc....
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2001 at 10:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248621833
View User Forum
2 posts
Hi,

My guild was hunting in Crystal area when they got this, since I am the Only Shadowknight in the guild they gave this to me when I was level 22 I leveled to 25 with it in 2 days....this thing does proc, sometimes the creature might resist every so often, but it can proc up to 5 times in same fight....or none at all, just depends. I love this weapon though. Thanks to my guild "The Society".

Synestro
25th Erudite SK "The Society"

# Apr 28 2001 at 9:44 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757359160
7 posts
I have one of these and Im a level 8 Sk and its great the effect disempower is awesome, it procs at lvl 1 i think so thats a plus its a debuffer, so thats cool. I also got it for free :)

Darkendsoul
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2001 at 8:23 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I got one of these its not bad at all . i have a lv 28 SK on lany`s i never practiced piercing and i used it on 5 kills went up to 21 already LOL ...
▲ Page top
Nifty Spear
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2001 at 3:40 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1594570568491
7 posts
This spear is pretty nice. I have one as my main weap (37 SK) and it is fairly fast for the amount of damage that it does. It's a lot of fun to see it proc and then watch a mob's life go down. It's also a big taunt too, so casters in my groups generally are very happy to see this go off. Also I have found that I take less damage when using this than I used to when attacking the same mobs with a Dark Reaver. Yeah it's a piercer and it's not nice that the skill caps at 215 instead of 225, but I think that by that point I will probably have a better / different weap. All in all if you are looking for a decent mid range weapon this isn't too shabby, give it a try and you'll be surprised.

Ndarain (DE SK)
Officer of the Raiders of the Lost Tavern
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2001 at 1:13 PM Rating: Decent

I don't know if anyone's noticed this, but it seems this has the exact same damage and delay as the Ghoulbane, 15/34. Perhaps this is meant to be the Shadowknight's Ghoulbane equivalent.

MORON! It's a Shadow Knight weapon. I use one. I am a Shadow Knight.

That 'thing' between your ears... it's called a BRAIN. When used with your EYES, you can use it to READ. I suggest you try it some time.

disempower taunt
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2001 at 8:37 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The disempower proc of this spear can taunt greatly on creatures... it's a supertaunt when it procs 2 times quickly.

It also removes the effect on the creature of the Siphon Strength spell.
▲ Page top
RE: disempower taunt
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2001 at 2:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592792229221
33 posts
Doesn't remove the Siphon Strength effect, it overwrites it because it is a more powerful effect that does exactly the same thing.
▲ Page top
RE: disempower taunt
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2001 at 1:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753427827
61 posts
The taunting is the reason I keep one of these in my EE bag. At 49 im still also using my very first dot Disease Cloud for taunting purposes. The only problem I'm having with this is that the proc is resisted most of the time on the mobs at my lvl.

▲ Page top
Disempower
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2000 at 7:18 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
What is the effect of this proc?
▲ Page top
RE: Disempower
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2001 at 4:49 AM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Disempower
Decrease Stamina from 10 (L14) to 20 (L34)
Decrease Strength from 14 (L14) to 15 (L16)
Decrease Armor Class (AC) from 7 (L14) to 9 (L28)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Shm (L14), Enc (L16)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 200 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Alteration
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Magic + 25

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 45
Spell Duration: 20 ticks (2.0 minutes)
Duration Formula: 7
Casting Time: 2.25 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.25 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: You feel frail.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso looks frail.
Spell fades: You feel your strength return.
▲ Page top
RE: Disempower
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2001 at 8:48 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592245584238
38 posts
Disempower is cast on your target, and it:
Decreases Stamina (by 10 - 20 depending on your level)
Decreases Strength (14 - 15)
Decreases AC (7 - 9)

Disempower is a level 14 Shaman spell, aswell as a level 16 Enchanter spell.
▲ Page top
